title.en: However, it is reluctant to give up this treasu...

content.en:
The 10,000-eyed snake recognized Ye Tian and knew that Ye Tian was the Great Ancestor of the outside world who had injured it last time.

But at this moment, it found that Ye Tian's cultivation seemed to have been promoted to the Heavenly Ancestor realm, so it was even more afraid, so it didn't dare to attack immediately.

However, it is reluctant to give up this treasure land.

After a few breaths of hesitation, it decided to run away.

Swish!

The 10,000-eyed snake fled quickly.

However, Ye Tian easily intercepted it and punched it.

Rumble!!!!

Under one punch, the countless shields formed by the Thousand-Eyed Snake were directly pierced, and even the body of the Thousand-Eyed Snake was pierced by a punch.

Now, Ye Tian has integrated the immeasurable magic technique of the Extreme Point Technique into his whole body, which means that his whole body contains the power of the Extreme Point Technique.

With a casual blow from his hand, it was the explosion of the Extreme Technique.

Therefore, this 10,000-eyed snake couldn't block Ye Tian's casual blow at all.

I saw that the Thousand-Eyed Snake tried to repair its injuries, and the wounds healed quickly, but they were punched through the body by Ye Tian.

After a few moves, the 10,000-eyed snake was already on the verge of death.

However, he didn't kill the 10,000-eyed snake, after all, it didn't do any good to kill it.

Seeing that Ye Tian did not continue to attack him, the Thousand-Eyed Snake dragged its seriously injured and dying body to flee for its life again, and disappeared after a while.

Swish!

Ye Tian shuttled to the green cave where the Ten Thousand Eyes Snake was staying, and the green aura around him continued to spread.

He absorbed some of the green breath and immediately looked happy.

"You can actually refine the body of the Heavenly Ancestor!"

He was surprised.

Heavenly Ancestor wants to improve his strength, firstly, he will integrate the other immeasurable magical powers in the Infinite Bone into his whole body, so that his body can become stronger and stronger, and secondly, he will improve his cultivation little by little and increase the strength of his flesh and blood, which can also improve his strength.

And this green aura is a treasure that can refine the body of the Heavenly Ancestor, and it can increase the strength of flesh and blood.

It's just that this kind of refining speed is very slow, and if you want to improve some strength, you need to absorb and refine this green aura here for a long time.

The 10,000-eyed snake had been staying here to absorb the refining green breath before, and its strength would be stronger than that of ordinary Heavenly Ancestors.

"The green aura that permeates the entrance of this cave can enhance the flesh and blood of the Heavenly Ancestor, so what about the depths of the cave!"

He tried to perceive the situation inside with his immeasurable will, but the time and space inside were distorted, and he extremely suppressed the penetration of the immeasurable will, so he could not detect anything.

The 10,000-eyed snake didn't enter the hole, so I wonder if there was any danger here?

Ye Tian was not afraid of danger, so he went in directly.

......

In the hole.

As soon as Ye Tian entered here, he found that there was a void inside, as if it was not the same place as the True Dragon Realm Ruins.

"Shards!"

Ye Tian thought.

The True Dragon Realm Ruins is a large fragment floating from the crack in the territorial waters, so this hole is connected to another small fragment.

Now.

He was in a sea of green, and as soon as he arrived, a dense mass of green insects shuttled over and attacked it at great speed.

The green insects that looked weak on the outside actually contained terrifying physical strength, no less than the body of the invincible fifth-stage Great Ancestor.

What's more important is that there are too many of them, plus there is suppression of the Heavenly Ancestor here, but there is no suppression of them.

"Get out!"

Ye Tian slapped it with one palm, and the power of the Extreme Technique exploded, instantly killing many green insects.

But then, more green bugs flew over.

This was not over, a huge green worm flew out of the green ocean, and their aura was already comparable to the Heavenly Ancestor level.

Seeing this, Ye Tian finally knew that the 10,000-eyed snake didn't dare to come in, if it came in to cultivate, it would definitely die!

He didn't run away, but fought these green bugs with all his might.

Judging from the situation of copying talent exploration, these green bugs are called ghost dragon worms, and they all have immeasurable ancestral endowments.

But they were able to become so powerful, not by virtue of immeasurable ancestral endowments, but by powerful bloodlines and the environment here.

The green atmosphere here is far more than a hundred or even a thousand times richer than the outside world, even if it is a garbage talent, when you come here, you can grow up!

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian and this group of ghost dragon insects continued to fight, and the number of ghost dragon insects gradually decreased.

Even the Heavenly Ancestor-level Ghost Dragon Worm couldn't withstand several attacks and was killed by him one by one.

However, if it was another Heavenly Ancestor who came, if he didn't escape in time, he was afraid that he would fold here.

Abrupt.

The dense ghost dragon insects seemed to have received some order, and they came to Ye Tian's vicinity to explode themselves.

These are comparable to the self-detonation of the invincible-level fifth-stage ghost dragon worms, and comparable to the attacks of the weaker boundary-breaking level.

It is conceivable that the self-explosion of so many ghost dragon insects, and the simultaneous self-explosion, is enough to bombard a Heavenly Ancestor like the Blood Ancient Heavenly Ancestor.

After rounds of self-detonation, Ye Tian was injured, and he was seriously injured.

The point is that these ghost dragon insects are still attacking him, and they are constantly attacking, so that he can't escape in time.

"No wonder such a good place hasn't been exposed, did those Heavenly Ancestors who found this place die here?" Ye Tian guessed.

After a long time, Ye Tian's replica body was almost about to fall, but the Ghost Dragon Insect Clan also suffered heavy losses, and most of the clan members were killed by him.

However, the ghost dragon insect clan multiplied very quickly, and perhaps after a long time, the number regained again.

Of course, the premise is that there is no Heavenly Ancestor to deal with them again.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's replica body also exploded, directly dragging a dozen Heavenly Ancestor-level ghost dragon insects, plus tens of thousands of ordinary ghost dragon insects, to annihilate together.

......

"I didn't expect that I had broken through to the Heavenly Ancestor level, and I was even surrounded and killed by a group of ghost dragon insects!"

Ye Tian said with emotion.

It is no wonder that the powerful Dongao Tianzu has not dared to step into the crack of the territorial sea boundary so far, just the fragments floating in the crack of the territorial sea boundary contain such a terrifying danger.

The real territorial sea boundary gap is afraid that there are too many crises for the death of Heavenly Ancestors like Dongao Heavenly Ancestor.

Of course, a crisis represents an opportunity.

The territory of the ghost dragon insect is a treasure of chance!

"Let another duplicate body enter the territory of the ghost dragon worm!"

Ye Tian decided.

Somewhere in the ruins of the True Dragon Realm.

Ye Tian's other replica body has been cultivating here, which is to prevent one of the replica bodies from falling, thus losing the True Dragon Realm Ruin Order.

Soon, another replica body was copied by him, and he immediately went to the fragment territory where the ghost dragon worm was located.

After a while, he came to the entrance of the cave and went straight in.
